compiled_state.title: Version bump during merge-to-main should be exempt from review and test gates
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: The version_bump phase in merge-to-main.sh modifies plugin.json and tries to commit, but pre-commit hooks (test gate + review gate) block it because the file has no associated test status or review recorded. Version bump commits are mechanical (single semver field change) and should bypass both gates. Fix: add plugin.json version bump path to review-gate-allowlist.conf and test-gate exemptions.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Cluster score: 3 (INTERMEDIATE). All 4 bugs share a root cause in _phase_version_bump() — git commit --amend triggers pre-commit hooks without recorded test/review status.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: Added DSO_MECHANICAL_AMEND=1 env var bypass in pre-commit hooks for merge-to-main.sh mechanical amends (version bump + post-merge validation fold-in). Layer 2 sentinel blocks misuse on non-amend commits.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
